objective: Add regression evidence for schema validation coverage across node gates run links and readbacks.
implementation: Added node 12 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 315 CI, merge, sync, and branch cleanup.
Added schema validation coverage regression evidence binding node gates, run-links, readbacks, workgraphs, and typed validator counts from the node 12 report.
Added a regression test that fails if the completed hardening wave loses any node gate, run-link, or core readback coverage.
